accepted_baseline.v12: product entity, browser workbench and read-only canvas foundation ready for review
accepted_baseline.v13: editable Workflow Studio pilot slice ready for review
accepted_baseline.v14: governed extension ecosystem pilot ready for review
accepted_baseline.v15: frontend interaction baseline ready for review

post_v15_required_closures: durable product entity mutation with audit refs
runtime-backed workflow run and inspect evidence
self-hosting smoke hardening with actual command output
PV16 readiness audit with no open fatal or major findings

closed_findings.finding: PV16 direct implementation could not start until schemas, runner and readiness audit existed.
closed_findings.closure: Created PV16 schemas, runner spec, runner implementation and implementation readiness audit.

closed_findings.finding: PRD and architecture text could be misread as claiming the full product-runtime target by V15.
closed_findings.closure: Reworded the PRD vision, target experience and success criteria plus architecture intent so V12-V15 remain bounded baselines and PV16 owns product-runtime hardening.

closed_findings.finding: PV16 substage PASS could be overclaimed if the runner only checked aggregate files.
closed_findings.closure: Added PV16-R0.1 runner rules, per-stage scenario checks, claim-to-evidence validation, CDP evidence generation helper and PASS evidence package.

accepted_allowed_claim: PV16 complete: product-runtime hardening pilot ready for review

implementation_entry.scope: PV16-S1 through PV16-SA bounded pilot implementation

exit_acceptance.allowed_claim: PV16 complete: product-runtime hardening pilot ready for review
